properties.Test Case: Character changes made to L1 change the "normal" style, which then affects L2 & L3. But if you set a character style on L2 or L3, that choice will override "normal" for that language. This should be indicated by the message at the bottom of the character tab: "This formatting is for all LANGUAGE text boxes with "XXX" style". But see https://issues.bloomlibrary.org/youtrack/issue/BL-9965 before writing up inheritence issues.
properties.Steps: - Character changes made to L1 change the "normal" style, which then affects L2 & L3. But if you set a character style on L2 or L3, that choice will override "normal" for that language. But see https://issues.bloomlibrary.org/youtrack/issue/BL-9965 before writing up inheritence issues.
